item.title: I'm Just a Bill: LIHEAP Expansion
item.description:
👀 LIHEAP Expansion

Low Income Home Energy Assistance Program expansion 119th Congress: funding parity with documented need · cooling assistance expansion · weatherization composing. Composes with Save-the-World Paper 2 (Energy) + Renewable Energy PTC/ITC. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
